d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d
d d!d"d#d
d$d%d&d'd(d)d*d+d,d-d.d/d0d1d2d3d4d5d6d7d8d9d:d;d<d=d
d-d4d9d:d;d<d=d>d?d@dAdBdCdDdEdFdGdHdIdJdKdLdMdNdOdPdQdRdSdTdUdVd
dWdXdYdZd[d\d]d^d_d`dadbdcdddedfdgdhdidjdkdldmdndodpdqdrdsdtdudvdwdxdydzd{d|d}d~d
d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d	d
d d!d"d#d
d$d%d&d'd(d)d*d+d,d-d.d/d0d1d2d3d4d5d6d7d8d9d:d;d<d=d
dCdDdEdFdGdHdIdJd
dKdLdMdNdOdPdQdRd
d\dSdTdUdVdWdXdYdZd

d`dadbdddedcd
dfdgdhdidjdkdldmdndodpdqdrdsdtdudvdwdxdydzd{d|d}d~d
SingleByteCharSetModel
ISO-8859-5Z	Bulgariang
! _B
?Fux
charset_nameZ
languageZ
char_to_order_mapZ
language_modelZ
typical_positive_ratioZ
keep_ascii_lettersZ

windows-1251N)
chardet.sbcharsetproberr

>/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/chardet/langbulgarianmodel.py
